identity.name: Omesh Sharma
identity.headline: Architecting ideas into scalable, production-ready systems.
identity.tagline: Solution-oriented engineer for backend platforms, AI workflows, automation products, and enterprise-grade delivery.
identity.shortBio: Solution-oriented Senior Software Engineer building scalable systems from concept to deployment across distributed platforms, backend engineering, AI/ML workflows, Document AI, MCP, agents, and enterprise applications.
identity.longBio: Omesh Sharma is a solution-oriented senior software engineer and product-minded builder with experience across Oracle BRM, messaging infrastructure, distributed backend systems, Document AI, OCR, AI/ML workflows, MCP and agent-based systems, quantitative trading systems, and VR/graphics platforms. He works with C/C++, Python, Java, cloud-native technologies, secure communication, multithreading, system design, performance optimization, high availability, debugging, and enterprise-scale backend infrastructure.

focusAreas: Oracle BRM, OSS/BSS, CRM, and enterprise systems
availableFor: Distributed systems and backend platform roles
AI agents, MCP workflows, and automation systems

journey.title: Graphics and AR/VR Engineering
journey.summary: Started professional work in C++/Python graphics engineering, OpenSceneGraph, CAD tooling, and AR/VR-style application features.

journey.title: Quant and Trading Systems
journey.summary: Designed quantitative trading and backtesting workflows using C++, Qt, Python, TA-Lib, Binance APIs, feature engineering, and parallel processing.

journey.title: Document AI Product Engineering
journey.summary: Built a cloud-based Document AI and OCR platform from scratch with distributed processing, parser engines, OCR pipelines, search, storage, Docker, and CI/CD.

journey.title: Enterprise Distributed Systems at Oracle
journey.summary: Leading development across Oracle BRM and Oracle Messaging Server, including secure communication, high availability, platform modernization, production support, cloud-native readiness, and AI-assisted troubleshooting.

journey.title: Personal Platform and Product Builder
journey.summary: Expanding the portfolio into a single showcase for career, products, services, experiments, writing, video content, and entrepreneurial work.

experience.summary: Leading development across Oracle Billing and Revenue Management and Oracle Messaging Server, focused on distributed systems, secure communication, high availability, platform modernization, and enterprise-scale backend infrastructure.
highlights: Led development and optimization of Oracle Messaging Server and BRM systems handling secure communication, routing, delivery, and distributed transaction processing.
Designed Active-Active and Active-Passive high-availability architectures for reliability, failover handling, and zero-downtime enterprise deployments.
Enabled TLS 1.3, FIPS compliance, Oracle Linux 9 migration, and security modernization across distributed services and legacy environments.
Resolved Sev1/Sev2 production issues involving SSL/TLS, networking, memory leaks, socket handling, distributed communication, and dependency conflicts.
Worked with enterprise customers during go-live, migration, upgrade, and cloud transformation activities to ensure deployment stability and production readiness.
Contributed to BRM business logic for billing workflows, rating, taxation, usage processing, transaction handling, and backend integrations.
Implemented REST APIs and backend automation services in Python for BRM integrations, operational tooling, and infrastructure automation.
Contributed to Java modernization from JDK 8 to 21, platform compatibility improvements, and cloud-native deployment readiness.
Improved observability, debugging, profiling, RCA workflows, retry mechanisms, timeout handling, queue management, and secure socket interactions.
Built AI-assisted internal knowledge base and troubleshooting workflows for faster issue resolution and reusable operational guidance.

experience.summary: Built a cloud-based Document AI and OCR platform from scratch focused on intelligent document management, distributed processing, and automation.
highlights: Architected a distributed Document AI platform for scanned documents, PDFs, invoices, and searchable document processing.
Developed high-performance OCR and parser engines using C++, Python, FastAPI, OpenCV, Tesseract OCR, and ImageMagick.
Built intelligent document classification, preprocessing, skew correction, orientation detection, and multilingual OCR pipelines.
Designed distributed PDF processing systems enabling parallel execution and searchable PDF generation.
Integrated Kafka, Samba NAS, Azure Blob Storage, and Elasticsearch for scalable processing and real-time search.
Containerized microservices with Docker and implemented monitoring, CI/CD, SonarCloud quality gates, and Azure DevOps workflows.

experience.summary: Designed and developed a quantitative trading and backtesting platform for automated cryptocurrency trading and market analysis.
highlights: Architected and developed a quantitative trading and backtesting engine using C++, Qt, Python, and TA-Lib.
Built automated trading workflows integrating Binance APIs and real-time market data processing.
Implemented genetic algorithms, optimization techniques, and feature engineering for market strategy evaluation.
Processed large-scale historical datasets using concurrent and parallel processing models.
Developed analytical modules for profitability, risk analysis, and quantitative trading metrics.

experience.summary: Worked on enterprise VR/AR and graphics applications using OpenSceneGraph, OpenGL, and Qt-based desktop systems.
highlights: Developed save/reload and replay frameworks for VR sessions using OpenSceneGraph, Qt, JSON serialization, and rendering pipelines.
Designed Qt-based integration bridges connecting CATIA, Navisworks, and Aveva applications with VR systems.
Built API tracing, rendering analysis, and automation frameworks using Python and AutoIt.
Worked extensively on OpenGL/OSG-based desktop applications, rendering workflows, and CAD integrations.

products.name: Document Field Extractor (DFA)
products.status: Built / Serving real manual-work automation needs
products.summary: A flexible document processing tool that transforms unstructured documents into structured business data, helping firms reduce repetitive manual data-entry work with smarter OCR, AI, rule-based, and custom extraction workflows.
products.problem: Many firms still process invoices, forms, certificates, bank statements, shipping documents, and business records manually, which creates delays, human errors, operational cost, and poor analytics readiness.
products.solution: DFA processes scanned PDFs, searchable PDFs, and images, extracts fields using AI-based, regex-based, template-based, or custom plugin logic, and exports structured data into Excel, CSV, and JSON.
products.yourRole: Designed and developed the tool as a practical side product to solve real document-processing pain points for firms with repetitive manual workflows.
features: OCR for scanned PDFs, searchable PDFs, and images
Custom plugin support for client-specific logic
Excel, CSV, and JSON structured output
Batch and real-time folder watcher processing
Power Query integration for refreshable Excel workflows
API quota management and multi-credential load balancing
impact: Reduces manual data-entry workload for document-heavy firms
Converts unstructured documents into analytics-ready structured data
Supports online, offline, batch, and real-time processing models
businessModel: Paid custom plugin and template development

media.title: Smart Data Extraction to Excel Demo

products.name: Business Automation Toolkit
products.status: Built for customers / Solving real manual-work problems
products.summary: A collection of practical automation tools and custom pipelines built during my entrepreneurial journey to help customers reduce repetitive manual work, convert unstructured files into usable data, and automate research/document workflows.
products.problem: Small firms and operational teams often spend hours manually converting images, PDFs, scanned documents, court/public records, website data, and text files into structured Excel or searchable formats.
products.solution: Built configurable tools and pipelines for image/PDF to Excel conversion, scanned file to searchable PDF transformation, web scraping to Excel, eCourt public hearing data extraction and summarization, PDF merging, text extraction, text-to-Excel conversion, and data manipulation.
products.yourRole: Designed, developed, customized, and delivered these tools directly around customer pain points as part of a broader entrepreneurial/product-building journey.
features: Any image and PDF file to Excel transformation with customization
Complete document extraction pipeline for customer-specific formats
Scanned file to searchable PDF conversion with OCR text layer
Translation pipeline to convert extracted text into different languages
PDF merging, assembly, and post-processing workflows
Target website scraping with Excel dump for marketing and research
Indian eCourts judicial hearing public data scraping and summarization
Controlled interface for easier operation by non-technical users
Repeated utilities for image-to-PDF, PDF text extraction, text-to-Excel, and data manipulation
impact: Helped customers reduce repetitive manual processing work
Converted messy files and public data into structured Excel/research outputs
Created reusable pipelines that can be customized for new firm-specific workflows

products.name: Image/PDF to Excel Transformation Tool
products.summary: A configurable pipeline that transforms images and PDF files into structured Excel outputs for customers who need repeatable document-to-spreadsheet conversion.
products.problem: Customers manually read image/PDF documents and re-enter values into Excel, causing delays, errors, and repeated operational effort.
products.solution: Built an extraction and transformation pipeline that reads images/PDFs, applies OCR and parsing logic, maps fields into customer-specific Excel layouts, and supports customization for different document formats.
products.yourRole: Designed and developed the complete pipeline, including extraction, mapping, customization logic, and structured Excel output.
impact: Reduced manual document-to-Excel work
Improved repeatability for customer-specific formats
Created a reusable pipeline for similar conversion needs

products.name: Scanned File to Searchable PDF and Translation Pipeline
products.summary: A pipeline for converting scanned files into searchable PDFs by adding OCR text layers, with support for translation, PDF merging, assembling, and customized document post-processing.
products.problem: Scanned documents are hard to search, reuse, translate, or assemble into structured digital records.
products.solution: Built a pipeline that applies OCR text layers, generates searchable PDFs, supports translation into other languages, and handles merging, assembly, and document post-processing.
products.yourRole: Designed and implemented the pipeline for scanned-file processing, OCR text layering, translation, and PDF assembly workflows.
impact: Made scanned documents searchable and reusable
Reduced manual document preparation work
Enabled multilingual document workflows

products.name: Target Website Scraping to Excel Tool
products.status: Built / Used for research and marketing workflows
products.summary: A web scraping pipeline that extracts data from target websites and exports structured Excel datasets for marketing, research, and business analysis.
products.problem: Marketing and research teams often manually collect public website data and convert it into spreadsheets.
products.solution: Built configurable scraping workflows that extract target website data, clean it, and dump structured outputs into Excel for research and outreach use cases.
products.yourRole: Developed the scraping, extraction, cleanup, and Excel export pipeline.
impact: Reduced manual research collection effort
Created reusable Excel-ready datasets
Supported marketing and research workflows

products.name: Indian eCourts Hearing Scraper and Audio Summarizer
products.summary: A legal-tech automation workflow that scrapes public Indian eCourts judicial hearing data, summarizes hearings, supports audio-assisted summaries, and provides an interface for controlled operation.
products.problem: Legal/public hearing research can involve repetitive portal checks, manual extraction of public hearing data, and time-consuming review or summarization.
products.solution: Built a controlled scraping and summarization workflow for Indian eCourts public data, including hearing data extraction, summarization, audio-assisted processing, and an easy-to-control interface.
products.yourRole: Designed and implemented the scraper, summarization workflow, audio-assisted processing support, and user-controlled interface.
impact: Reduced repetitive public hearing research effort
Converted hearing data into easier summaries
Provided a controlled interface for practical usage

products.name: eCourts AI Hearing Intelligence Platform
products.status: On-prem product direction / Built around legal hearing intelligence
products.summary: An on-prem legal-tech AI platform direction for collecting public Indian eCourts hearing information, organizing all hearings, generating summaries, and supporting audio-based hearing intelligence workflows.
products.problem: Legal teams and researchers need a controlled way to track, review, and summarize public hearing information without manually checking portals and processing hearing material repeatedly.
products.solution: Built an AI-assisted platform direction that combines eCourts public data scraping, hearing organization, summarization, audio-assisted processing, and controlled review interfaces.
products.yourRole: Designed and developed the scraping, hearing data workflow, summarization logic, audio-assisted processing direction, and controlled interface experience.
features: Indian eCourts public hearing data collection
impact: Reduced repeated legal research effort
Made hearing information easier to review and summarize
Created a product direction for on-prem legal intelligence workflows

products.name: Graphics Save/Load and Replay Framework
products.summary: A C++ framework for storing and replaying CAD/graphics application state using transforms, matrices, and JSON.
products.problem: Graphics application users needed to return to a prior project state and restore interactive feature data.
products.solution: Persisted state data such as positions, matrices, transforms, and controller data, then replayed features on reload.
products.yourRole: Designed and developed the framework using C++, STL, JSON, and OpenSceneGraph workflows.
impact: Improved graphics application workflow continuity
Enabled state restoration for complex CAD/VR scenarios
